name: Heartsteel

passives.name: Colossal Consumption
passives.effects: While within 700 units of an enemy champion, generate a stack on them each second, stacking up to 3 times. Your next basic attack against a target with 3 stacks is empowered to consume them all to deal {{as|70|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 6% '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] and grant you permanent {{as|'''bonus''' health}} equal to{{ft|8% of that amount|{{as|{{ap|70*0.08}} (+ {{ap|6*0.08}}% '''maximum''' health)}}}} (30 second cooldown per target).

passives.name: Goliath
passives.effects: Gain {{as|{{pp|key=%|0 to 30 for 11|0 to 10000|type='''maximum''' health}}|hp}} increased size.

effects_structured.raw: While within 700 units of an enemy champion, generate a stack on them each second, stacking up to 3 times

Your next basic attack against a target with 3 stacks is empowered to consume them all to deal {{as 70 physical damage}} {{as (+ 6% '''maximum''' health)}} {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] and grant you permanent {{as '''bonus''' health}} equal to{{ft 8% of that amount {{as {{ap 70*0.08}} (+ {{ap 6*0.08}}% '''maximum''' health)}}}} (30 second cooldown per target).
Gain {{as {{pp key=% 0 to 30 for 11 0 to 10000 type='''maximum''' health}} hp}} increased size.

simpleDescription: Restores Health on kill or assist

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Goliath size scaling is modeled as a clamped linear mapping from 0 to 30% increased size over 0 to 10000 maximum health.
Heartsteel represents anti-frontline tank scaling: proximity stack-up on a target, empowered hit at 3 stacks, and permanent health growth from damage dealt.
Colossal Consumption cooldown is per-target and starts after the empowered hit, matching item text for repeated frontline trades.
